name: openclaw-ruh-enterprise
description: Ruh.ai — Digital employees with a soul

scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:agent-builder && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:admin && npm run test:marketplace
scripts.test:backend: cd ruh-backend && bun test tests/unit/auth/ tests/unit/config.test.ts tests/unit/marketplaceStore.test.ts tests/unit/schemaMigrations.test.ts && bun test tests/contract/
scripts.test:agent-builder: cd agent-builder-ui && bun test lib/openclaw/api.test.ts && bun test lib/ hooks/ app/ services/ middleware.test.ts --path-ignore-patterns '**/api.test.ts'
scripts.coverage:all: npm run coverage:backend && npm run coverage:agent-builder && npm run coverage:frontend && npm run coverage:admin && npm run coverage:marketplace
scripts.coverage:agent-builder: cd agent-builder-ui && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --path-ignore-patterns 'e2e/**' --path-ignore-patterns 'test-results/**' && bun run scripts/check-coverage.ts
scripts.coverage:admin: cd admin-ui && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --path-ignore-patterns 'e2e/**' --path-ignore-patterns 'test-results/**' && bun run scripts/check-coverage.ts
scripts.coverage:marketplace: cd packages/marketplace-ui && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov && bun run scripts/check-coverage.ts
scripts.coverage:report: sh -c 'echo "=== Coverage Report ==="; failed=0; report(){ name="$1"; shift; echo "--- $name ---"; out="$("$@" 2>&1)"; status=$?; printf "%s\n" "$out" | grep -E "^\[coverage\]|^File +\||^Lines:|^Functions:|^Jest:|^Ran [0-9]+ tests|^PASS|^FAIL|^error: script" || true; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then failed=1; fi; }; report backend npm run coverage:backend; report agent-builder npm run coverage:agent-builder; report frontend npm run coverage:frontend; report admin npm run coverage:admin; report marketplace npm run coverage:marketplace; exit $failed'
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:agent-builder && npm run typecheck:admin && npm run typecheck:marketplace
